headline: EchoStar Stock Remains One of the Best Ways to Play the SpaceX IPO
summary: EchoStar  is one of the best plays on SpaceX, and its stock could benefit ahead of the SpaceX IPO as investors look for ways to get exposure to Elon Musk’s company.  SpaceX filed its eagerly awaited IPO prospectus Wednesday and the deal could get priced by mid June.  It may be tough for individual investors to get an allocation in the SpaceX IPO given that it’s expected to be a hot deal dominated by institutional buyers.

headline: REX Shares Launches T-REX 2X ASTS (ASUP) & 2X LITE (LITU) ETFs
summary: MIAMI, May 21, 2026--REX Shares ("REX") and Tuttle Capital Management ("TCM") today announce the launch of the T-REX 2X Long ASTS Daily Target ETF (Cboe: ASUP) and the T-REX 2X Long LITE Daily Target ETF (Cboe: LITU), leveraged ETFs providing 2x daily long exposure to AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASTS) and Lumentum Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: LITE), respectively.

(Nasdaq: ASTS) and Lumentum Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: LITE), respectively.
